article_meta.title: Classes of more than 70 students amid historic declines in test scores 02:12 â¢ Source: CNN Classes o

reasoning: The summary uses neutral, attributed language and avoids the article’s more emotive framing, sticking to study findings and quoted attributions. No loaded terms or unqualified judgments appear.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses neutral verbs like ‘reveals,’ ‘emphasized,’ and ‘recommends,’ with clear attribution.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: All claims are sourced to the NWEA study or quoted from Dr. Lewis.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: Subjective assessments are presented as quotes or attributions, not as the model’s voice.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: No emotive or alarmist language; tone remains measured.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: Does not infer motives or internal states.
custom_reasoning.slant: Focuses proportionally on the single primary source (NWEA) presented in the article.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Includes the key perspectives present (NWEA and named co-author), adding CNN reporting as source type.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Avoids loaded adjectives; sticks to factual descriptors.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Reflects the study’s findings without amplifying negativity.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: No undue deference or dismissal; treats sources as presented.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: Does not adopt the headline’s more dramatic framing; paraphrases neutrally with attribution.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Captures all distinct perspectives present in the source excerpt (NWEA and study author).
